title: TVK captures 4 seats in Tiruppur textile belt; AIADMK wins 3, DMK 1
summary: TVK emerged as the largest party in Tiruppur district by winning four of the eight Assembly seats on counting day, with AIADMK retaining three and DMK reduced to a single constituency.

title: Tiruppur North winner M. Selvakumar promises GST simplification for knitting units
summary: Tiruppur North's TVK winner M. Selvakumar said his first legislative push would be a representation to the Centre on GST simplification for the knitting and dyeing units that anchor the city's economy.

title: Noyyal river rejuvenation plan announced by TVK's P. Ramesh Raj (Tiruppur South)
summary: Tiruppur South's freshly-minted TVK MLA P. Ramesh Raj announced a Noyyal river rejuvenation plan as his flagship constituency project, in coordination with the corporation and PWD.

title: Palladam windmill owners meet TVK candidate S. Gunasekaran over power tariff revision
summary: Wind energy producers from Palladam met TVK winner S. Gunasekaran on May 5 and pressed for a fresh open-access power tariff revision to support their long-term contracts.

title: AIADMK's P. Dhanapal (Avinashi) thanks voters for backing Athikadavu project
summary: AIADMK's Avinashi winner P. Dhanapal thanked voters for backing the party's stand on the Athikadavu-Avinashi water project and said its remaining works would be his top assembly priority.

title: Dharapuram AIADMK's K. Radhakrishnan meets coconut farmers, promises cold storage units
summary: Dharapuram's AIADMK winner K. Radhakrishnan met coconut farmer federations on May 5 and committed to mobilising central subsidy for new cold storage units across the constituency.

title: Kangayam TVK winner V. Karthikeyan to push for cattle market modernization
summary: Kangayam's TVK winner V. Karthikeyan said modernisation of the historic Kangayam cattle market — known for its native breed — would be one of his first formal demands in the new assembly.

title: Udumalaipettai AIADMK's Udumalai Radhakrishnan focuses on PAP canal water sharing
summary: Udumalaipettai's AIADMK winner Udumalai Radhakrishnan said equitable Parambikulam-Aliyar Project canal water sharing for delta-end villages would dominate his constituency representation.

title: Madathukulam DMK winner R. Mahendran: 'Will complete pending flyover'
summary: Madathukulam's lone DMK winner R. Mahendran said completion of the long-delayed Madathukulam bypass flyover would be his top constituency priority in the new term.

title: Tiruppur dyeing unit owners seek 24x7 power supply from new MLAs
summary: The Tiruppur dyers' association has met all eight winning MLAs to press for a guaranteed 24x7 industrial power supply, citing rising export order pressure.

title: Avinashi-Athikadavu project: AIADMK promises fresh funding proposal
summary: AIADMK's Avinashi MLA said the party would route a fresh funding proposal for the remaining stretches of the Avinashi-Athikadavu project to the new state government.

title: Tiruppur Exporters' Association to host felicitation for all winning candidates
summary: TEA has scheduled a joint felicitation function next week for all eight winning MLAs of the district, irrespective of party, to lay out a common growth charter for the cluster.

title: 78.4 percent turnout in Tiruppur — second highest in Kongu region
summary: Final figures put the Tiruppur district turnout at 78.4 percent, the second highest across the eight Kongu districts after Dharmapuri, election officials confirmed on May 5.

title: DMK concedes defeat in three urban seats, blames internal factionalism
summary: DMK's district unit conceded defeat in three urban Tiruppur seats and attributed the slide to internal factionalism, promising a thorough organisational overhaul.

title: New Tiruppur city police commissionerate demand gains momentum
summary: The long-pending demand for a separate Tiruppur city police commissionerate has gained fresh momentum, with multiple winning MLAs publicly endorsing it on counting day.
